title: Question about Unit 00
wikitext:
[]: Question about Unit 00? [NO SPOILERS] Post by Eva 04 » Sun Aug 16, 2009 9:50 pm Is there a reason why they kept Unit 00 in it's yellow paint in rebuild instead of getting it upgraded like in the series?I mean,I know colors dont matter but didnt Unit 00 have rocket boosters in it's shoulder blades when it got repaired and repainted?It just seems weird that they didnt bother doing that this time around.

[]: Post by roblucci01 » Sun Aug 16, 2009 9:59 pm Um, dude, you might want to change to place a "No Spoilers" tag on the end of the topic title.....

[]: Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Aug 16, 2009 10:00 pm Seeing as how Rebuild seems to go through Evas a lot faster than the original series and ugh . . . SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 16, 2009 10:01 pm Short of the creators actually stating the reason somewhere, you won't get an answer, so make something up that pleases you. Perhaps this will suffice: - Eva-00's color scheme was completely overhauled for Rebuild based on a concept created for NGE but left unused. Why bother doing the yellow-to-blue thing again? They did the pylon upgrade, so the second action figure happened anyway. - Blue was being saved for Eva-06. [/not a spoiler] - The "rocket boosters" on the shoulder pylons were dumb and made no sense. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by wonderluster » Tue Aug 18, 2009 3:11 pm I haven't seen somebody fail that badly since the time I crawled into an ATM machine and got stuck for 2 days. Then Reichu ripped a hole in space and time and got me out.
